commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And you shall kill the bullock before the LORD, by the door of the tabernacle of meeting. Al, is now wanting in the printed Hebrew and Samaritan, though expressed by the Protestant translators, (who often help their text) and by all the ancient versions. Kennicott mentions one manuscript, which retains it very properly. (Haydock) The victim was offered on the altar of holocausts, before the tabernacle, the seat of God's majesty. (Calmet) Moses was the priest on this occasion. (Menochius) (Psalm xcviii.
